# Support

Here is how to get help with Scribe.

## Read the docs

Most questions are answered in the [user guide](../docs/README.md):

- [Getting started](../docs/getting-started.md) — install and permissions
- [Dictation basics](../docs/dictation-basics.md)
- [Recording modes](../docs/recording-modes.md)
- [Meeting transcription](../docs/meeting-transcription.md)
- [Transcribe an audio file](../docs/transcribe-audio-file.md)
- [Preferences reference](../docs/preferences.md)
- [Privacy](../docs/privacy.md)
- [Troubleshooting](../docs/troubleshooting.md) — logs, permissions, and reset

## Report a bug or request a feature

Open an issue and pick a template:

- [Bug report](https://github.com/AgentC-Consulting/scribe-app/issues/new/choose)
- [Feature request](https://github.com/AgentC-Consulting/scribe-app/issues/new/choose)

Before attaching logs or transcripts to a public issue, review them and remove
anything sensitive. Never attach audio recordings.

## Private or security reports

For anything you would rather not post publicly — including security issues —
email [agent_c@agentc.consulting](mailto:agent_c@agentc.consulting).
